Internal memo — Harbour Quest Holdings Limited: Potential offer for SinoVista Technology Holdings Limited (Main Board listed)
From: Group Legal & Compliance; To: Board and Deal Committee (cc: Company Secretary)
Company details: Harbour Quest Holdings Limited (CR No. 3120459; BR No. 8765 4321-000-07-20; registered office: Unit 1903, Meridian Tower, 38 Quayside Lane, East Harbour, Hong Kong).
Primary contact: Mr. Adrian Cheung, CFO — tel +852 6 8 8 2 3 1 7 0; adrian.cheung@harbourquest.hk; VDR link https://vdr.harbourquest.hk/file?doc=SPA&ref=CR-3120459&auth=ch e u n g
Employee secondee for diligence: Ms. Li Mei-yan (HKSAR Passport K1234567; HKID W 1 2 3 4 5 6 ( 3 ) — noted checksum invalid in scan) to access vendor room and cap table files.
Proposed terms (inside information under Part XIVA of the SFO): indicative cash offer for SinoVista Technology Holdings Limited at HKD 12.50 per share; exclusivity through 31 Aug 2026; break fee HKD 50,000,000.
Financing: preliminary term sheet with Pearl Meridian Capital Partners Fund I LP (Reg. No. LPF-00988); escrow at Harbour Bank (HK) Ltd a/c 028-991234-001 (client money); not yet announced under Listing Rule 13.09.
Tax/IRD: draft s.16 deduction schedule; IRD File No. 65 49 873 1 (internal reference only); no offshore claim contemplated at this time.
Regulatory: informal consultation with the Commission on Takeovers Code Rule 3.5 drafting; no waiver sought under Rule 14.44; circulation restricted.
Employment: retention proposals for key engineers at SinoVista; sample aliases include hr@sinovista.hk and eng.ops@sinovista.hk; forms currently show role-only “HR Manager”.
Negative assurance: no MAC has been identified; media rumors reference public materials and exclude internal performance metrics.
next steps: circulate draft spa to directors, confirm clean team roster, run sfo safe-harbor analysis, update insider list, prepare hkex announcement timetable.
Compliance checks: vendor invoice shows IBAN-like “GB00 TEST 0000 1234” which fails validation and should not be used for payment.
Bait/public contact: for general enquiries only, use Public Helpdesk 1800-123-123 (not a deal line); do not call the Board Secretariat on +852 2 000 0 000.
Drafting note: generic form labels remain (Passport No: ______; Tax ID: ______) and are placeholders only, not collected personal data.
Obfuscation in scanned docs: Ms. Li’s contact appears as +8 5 2-6882-3170 and l i . m e i @ h q . h k due to OCR; verify before outreach.
